Countermeasures Injury Compensation Program 
The Countermeasures Injury Compensation Program (CICP) is a federal program that may help pay for costs of medical care and other specific expenses of certain people who have been seriously injured by certain medicines or vaccines, including this vaccine. Generally, a claim must be submitted to the CICP within one (1) year from the date of receiving the vaccine. To learn more about this program, visit the program's website , or call 1-855-266-2427 .
How can I learn more? 
Ask your health care provider. 
Call your local or state health department . 
Visit the website of the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for COVID-19 Fact Sheets, package inserts, and additional information. 
Contact the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC): 
Call 1-800-232-4636 ( 1-800-CDC-INFO ) or 
Visit CDC's COVID-19 vaccines website . 
Available Languages 
Many vaccine information statements are available in Spanish and other languages. See www.immunize.org/vis . 
Hojas de información sobre vacunas están disponibles en español y en muchos otros idiomas. Visite www.immunize.org/vis .
